---
title: "Medical Data Science Curriculum"
subtitle: "Division of Data Science and Artificial Intelligence — FK Udayana"
about:
  template: marquee
  links:
    - text: Basic Tier
      href: basic/index.qmd
    - text: Intermediate Tier
      href: intermediate/index.qmd
    - text: Advanced Tier
      href: advanced/index.qmd
    - text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/balinesthesia/mds-curriculum
      icon: github
---

## Overview

A tiered, cohort-based curriculum bridging traditional clinical statistics and modern data science for anesthesiology residents. Built around reproducibility, causal reasoning, and real clinical datasets.

This curriculum is **not** a generic data science course. Every concept is anchored to anesthesia and critical care practice. Residents leave as researchers who can build, or builders who can publish.

---

## Curriculum Structure

| Tier | Duration | Language | Goal |
|---|---|---|---|
| [Basic](basic/index.qmd) | 16 weeks | R | Critical consumer + reproducible researcher |
| [Intermediate](intermediate/index.qmd) | 20 weeks | Python | Independent analyst, researcher/builder entry |
| [Advanced](advanced/index.qmd) | 24 weeks | Python + AI-assisted | Clinical tool builder or preprint-ready researcher |

**Progression:** Linear. Basic → Intermediate → Advanced.  
**Cohort size:** 4–6 residents per cohort.  
**Contact hours:** 2 hours/week.

---

## License

[CC BY-NC 4.0](LICENSE) — Free to use and adapt for non-commercial academic and clinical education with attribution.
